name: ripgrep
description: Blazingly fast recursive search tool — faster than grep, respects .gitignore, supports regex.

commands.name: rg
commands.description: Search for a regex pattern in files

commands.name: rg -t
commands.description: Search only in files of a specific type

commands.name: rg --json
commands.description: Output results in JSON format for programmatic use

use_cases: Search codebases for function definitions or references
Find configuration values across project files
Locate TODO/FIXME comments for task prioritization
